name: Emporio Kitchen Mixer
description: Italian designed and manufactured by GESSI, this kitchen mixer features an easy-to-use paddle handle in a modern finish.
shortDescription: Italian designed kitchen mixer with paddle handle in modern finish.
specificationSummaryText: Emporio kitchen mixer with paddle handle, 360-degree spout rotation, and 4-star WELS rating.
